title: Seventh judicial district
doc_html:
§621.7.  Seventh judicial district

The Seventh Judicial District Court shall have two judges.

Acts 1956, Ex.Sess., No. 7, §1.  Amended by Acts 1978, No. 39, §7, eff. June 1, 1978.
